name: CovAgent
description: An agent orchestration for stimulus generation in RTL verification of sub-system and module level hardware designs. Built with LangGraph and Questa Sim.

name: PPAgent
description: An agent that refines RTL for better PPA (power, performance, area), benchmarked on picorv32 with a two-stage evaluation harness using Icarus Verilog and Yosys.

name: MetaSolver
description: An adaptive reasoning agent that routes questions across 7+ inference-time strategies + an evaluation harness with 1,000+ test instances under a strict LLM call budget.

name: Collagent
description: An agent with custom tools for university data integration. Built with LangGraph. For students.

name: Data Den
description: An AI workspace to optimize data analytics tasks with GPU acceleration. Built with LangChain utilizing SOL supercomputer.

name: Python Sandbox API
description: Sandboxed Python execution API. Built with nsjail and Flask. Deployed on Google Cloud Run.

name: Pomodoro Max
description: A minimal local-first focus timer with live efficiency tracking, built with Tauri and synced to Notion.

name: Medical Image Classification with DL
description: Benchmarking on MedMNIST datasets using frameworks with ResNet architectures.

name: The Passive-Aggressive Shell
description: A sarcastic Linux shell integrated with an LLM, provides snarky assistance for invalid commands, and offers guidance on utilities.

name: Asynchronous FIFO Design and Verification
description: Parameterized asynchronous FIFO in SystemVerilog, a self-checking SVA/coverage-driven testbench + DPI-based verification.

name: MIPS Multicycle Processor
description: A modular MIPS multicycle processor implementation focused on simulation, analysis, and exploration of processor design.

name: Matrix Multiplier
description: A Verilog-based systolic 4x4 matrix multiplier with integrated RAM, optimized for hardware design and computation.

name: studiovistara.com
description: A modern and sleek website design for Studiovistara, an architecture firm based in India.

name: jeeyapatel.studio
description: A web page for Jeeya Patel's Architecture Portfolio

name: jainampatel.vercel.app
description: A web page for Jainam Patel's Architecture Portfolio
